auth.label: API Token
auth.description: TinyURL API token passed with the Authorization: Bearer <token> header. Create it from Profile > API in TinyURL.

actions.name: create_short_url
actions.description: Create a TinyURL short link for a destination URL.

url.description: The full URL to shorten, including the http:// or https:// protocol.

alias.description: A custom alias for the short URL. It must be unique for the selected domain.

domain.description: The domain to use when TinyURL creates the short link.

tags.description: Tags to associate with the created TinyURL.

expires_at.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the created TinyURL should expire.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a TinyURL short link.

tiny_url.description: The TinyURL short link that was created.

alias.description: The alias used by the created TinyURL.

domain.description: The domain used by the created TinyURL.

tags.description: The tags associated with the created TinyURL.

expires_at.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by TinyURL.

created_at.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by TinyURL.

outputSchema.description: The created TinyURL returned by the TinyURL API.

actions.name: list_urls
actions.description: List TinyURLs from the TinyURL account by availability status.

type.description: Whether to list available TinyURLs or archived TinyURLs.

page.description: The 1-based page number of the TinyURL results to fetch.

limit.description: The maximum number of TinyURLs to fetch per page, from 1 to 100.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing TinyURLs from the TinyURL API.

alias.description: The alias used by the TinyURL.

domain.description: The domain used by the TinyURL.

url.description: The original destination URL, when returned by TinyURL.

created_at.description: An ISO 8601 timestamp returned by TinyURL.

items.description: A single TinyURL item returned by the TinyURL listing API.

data.description: The TinyURLs returned for the selected page.

page.description: The current TinyURL results page, when returned by TinyURL.

limit.description: The number of TinyURLs returned per page, when returned by TinyURL.

total.description: The total number of TinyURLs matching the selected type, when returned by TinyURL.

outputSchema.description: The paginated TinyURL listing returned by the TinyURL API.
